scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/001_watch_relations_soft_delete.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/002_watcher_devices.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/003_watcher_name_announcements.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/004_watcher_max_persons.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/005_pairing_requests.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/006_watcher_disconnect_events.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/007_person_max_devices.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/008_device_link_requests.sql
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/001_watch_relations_soft_delete.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/002_watcher_devices.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/003_watcher_name_announcements.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/004_watcher_max_persons.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/005_pairing_requests.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/006_watcher_disconnect_events.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/007_person_max_devices.sql --local && npx wrangler d1 execute dev-ibinda-db --file=./migrations/008_device_link_requests.sql --local
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:create && npm run db:schema
